user.title: Iriy – Setup
user.description: Pick the RAW sensors of your weather station (instantaneous current values, NOT daily-aggregate sensors). Iriy computes FAO-56 reference evapotranspiration (ET0) from them.

data_description.temperature: Current outdoor temperature — an instantaneous value, NOT a daily min/max sensor.
data_description.wind: Current wind speed (average) — NOT the gust sensor.
data_description.pressure: Absolute (station) pressure — NOT the relative/sea-level value.
data_description.rain: Rain amount. For mode 'Cumulative (resets daily)' pick a daily rain counter.
data_description.import_history: On setup, import ET0 for past days from the recorder into the history graph (as far back as data exists). Runs once; refresh later via the iriy.backfill service.
data_description.history_days: How many past days to import (0 = none).

data_description.temperature: Current outdoor temperature — an instantaneous value, NOT a daily min/max sensor.
data_description.wind: Current wind speed (average) — NOT the gust sensor.
data_description.pressure: Absolute (station) pressure — NOT the relative/sea-level value.
data_description.rain: Rain amount. For mode 'Cumulative (resets daily)' pick a daily rain counter.
data_description.import_history: Import past days when enabled (runs once). Use the iriy.backfill service to refresh.
data_description.history_days: How many past days to import (0 = none).

error.name_exists: A zone with that name already exists.

recalculate.name: Recalculate
recalculate.description: Force an immediate recomputation of ET0 and deficit.

backfill.name: Backfill from history
backfill.description: Discard today's balance and rebuild it from the recorder history (yesterday's daily value + today's course). With days > 0, past days are also added as long-term ET0 statistics (as far back as data exists).

days.name: Days back
days.description: How many past days to add as ET0 statistics (0 = only today/yesterday).

add_water.name: Log water
add_water.description: Subtract an applied amount of water (mm) from a zone's deficit.
